data.body: PASS 1 review note (T5c Security overlay): No finding raised against this chunk for the security overlay. This is a documentation-only ticket ("no behavior changes") that describes an EXISTING signing surface rather than adding a new endpoint, network exposure, auth boundary, or credential. The underlying secret lifecycle in src/rebar/signing.py is already sound (0o600 atomic key file, gitignored, fingerprint-only exposure via key_id, env-var custody). One forward-looking note for the author (not a blocking finding): since AC mandates "copy-pasteable examples" for the signing surface, ensure example snippets never echo/log a raw key value or hardcode a real REBAR_SIGNING_KEY — keep them fingerprint/placeholder-only, consistent with the never-log-the-secret invariant the source already enforces.
